title: Harden Snyk ignore rationale text for audit quality

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text: Updating existing Snyk ignore rationale to remove pilot/API phrasing and replace with audit-ready technical context (scope, control, exploitability basis, residual risk statement).

comments.author: derek.norrbom
comments.text:
Updated ignore rationale text for finding 983bb4bf-16a9-4225-9394-956896b825e8 to audit-ready wording and removed pilot/API language.

Changes made:
- Updated policy id 9f5b1d65-bbd2-44a1-a2c6-1c3a13cb9b48 via PATCH.
- Renamed policy to: ignore-command-injection-ec2-bench-status-line-10.
- Replaced reason with detailed technical context (non-shell list invocation, trust boundary, argv token handling).

Verification:
- `snyk code test --include-ignores` shows the same finding as ignored with the updated reason text.
- Summary remains: Ignored issues 1, Open issues 15.
